boats.name: SEABIRD
boats.tagline: Very cool

boats.name: Azimut 58 — White
boats.tagline: Private Azimut 58 charter · Puerto Banús, Marbella
boats.description: The Azimut 58 (White) is a 17.6 m Italian flybridge motor yacht with three en-suite cabins, a sun-drenched foredeck and an open flybridge for panoramic Costa del Sol views. Elegant, spacious and effortless — ideal for relaxed family days, celebrations and golden-hour cruising for up to 10 guests. Skippered, from Puerto Banús, Marbella.

boats.name: Mefasa 90
boats.tagline: Private Mefasa 90 charter · Puerto Banús, Marbella
boats.description: The Mefasa 90 is a 29 m superyacht for unforgettable days on the Costa del Sol — vast deck spaces, a jacuzzi, a beach club and elegant interiors across multiple cabins. Crewed private charters for up to 12 guests with all-inclusive luxury from Puerto Banús, Marbella — the ultimate way to experience Marbella by sea.

boats.name: Sunseeker Predator 72
boats.tagline: Private Sunseeker Predator 72 charter · Puerto Banús, Marbella
boats.description: The Sunseeker Predator 72 is a 22.1 m thoroughbred sport yacht — striking lines, blistering performance and a sunken beach-club stern. Four cabins, sprawling sun terraces and a glamorous cockpit make her a statement charter for up to 11 guests. Skippered, from Puerto Banús, Marbella.

boats.name: Princess F70
boats.tagline: Private Princess F70 charter · Puerto Banús, Marbella
boats.description: The Princess F70 is a 21.8 m flybridge flagship — a huge flybridge with bar and sunbeds, a full-beam owner's suite and four cabins for overnight comfort. The ultimate platform for celebrations, family days and multi-day cruising for up to 12 guests. Private skippered charters from Marbella.

boats.name: Sunseeker 68 Sport
boats.tagline: Private Sunseeker 68 Sport charter · Puerto Banús, Marbella
boats.description: The Sunseeker 68 Sport is a 21 m luxury sport yacht — commanding presence, a vast foredeck lounge and a beach-club swim platform. Three sumptuous cabins make her equally suited to a glamorous day charter or an overnight escape along the Costa del Sol. Skippered, up to 12 guests, from Puerto Banús.

boats.name: Sunseeker 63
boats.tagline: Private Sunseeker 63 charter · Puerto Banús, Marbella
boats.description: The Sunseeker 63 is a 19 m flagship-feel sport yacht with sleek Sunseeker DNA — expansive sun terraces, a generous cockpit and three luxurious cabins. Built for show-stopping days on the water, swim breaks in hidden coves and golden-hour cruising for up to 10 guests. Private skippered charters from Marbella.

boats.name: Princess V58
boats.tagline: Private Princess V58 charter · Puerto Banús, Marbella
boats.description: The Princess V58 is an 18.2 m British sports yacht blending performance with refined comfort — sweeping sunpads, a spacious cockpit and three elegant cabins below. Perfect for high-style day charters, swim stops and sundowner cruises for up to 12 guests. Skippered, from Marbella / Puerto Banús.

boats.name: Sunseeker Predator 58
boats.tagline: Private Sunseeker Predator 58 charter · Puerto Banús, Marbella
boats.description: The Sunseeker Predator 58 is a 17.6 m British performance sport yacht — low, muscular lines, a retractable hardtop and serious pace. Big sunpads, a social cockpit and a swim platform make her a favourite for fast coastal runs and glamorous days at anchor for up to 11 guests. Skippered private charters from Puerto Banús.

boats.name: Prestige 500
boats.tagline: Private Prestige 500 charter · Puerto Banús, Marbella
boats.description: The Prestige 500 is a 16 m flybridge motor yacht designed around space and light — a vast flybridge, full-beam owner's cabin and an easy indoor-outdoor flow. Perfect for relaxed family days, celebrations and sunset cruises for up to 12 guests. Private skippered charters from Marbella, fuel and captain included.

boats.name: Fairline Targa 43
boats.tagline: Private Fairline Targa 43 charter · Puerto Banús, Marbella
boats.description: Charter the Fairline Targa 43 — a sleek 14.4 m British sports cruiser built for fast, stylish days on the Costa del Sol. A huge sun-soaked cockpit, bathing platform and sociable layout host up to 11 guests for coastal cruising, swim stops and sundowners. Skippered private day charters from Puerto Banús, Marbella — fuel and captain included.

boats.name: Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski
boats.tagline: Sea-Doo GTX & GTI jet skis — self-drive from Puerto Banús, no licence needed
boats.description: Sea-Doo GTX and GTI jet skis for rent in Marbella, launching from Puerto Banús. Self-drive the Marbella coast on powerful 3-seater Sea-Doos — life jackets and a safety briefing included. No licence required under Spanish licence-free rules. €250 for 1 hour, €450 for 2 hours, then €200 each additional hour.

boats.name: Olympic 490
boats.tagline: License-free 4.9 m day boat · Faliraki Beach, Rhodes · easy & stable
boats.description:
A relaxed and easy day on the Aegean — the Olympic 490 is a 4.9-metre license-free open boat departing from Faliraki Beach on the Greek island of Rhodes. With a 40HP engine, hydraulic steering, GPS tracker, swim platform and sun canopy, it's the perfect starter charter for first-time boaters who want to explore the Rhodes coastline at their own pace.

WHAT YOU'LL LOVE
• Easy handling and excellent stability — designed for first-time skippers
• Front sun deck for relaxing between swims
• Hydraulic steering for smooth, effortless control
• Onboard cool box to keep drinks chilled
• Sun canopy for shade on hot Greek afternoons
• Swim platform for easy access in and out of the crystal-clear water

PERFECT FOR
Couples, small families, or groups of friends looking for a budget-friendly self-drive day on the Aegean. Cruise to nearby beaches and coves, drop anchor for a swim, picnic onboard, or just sunbathe on the front deck.

REQUIREMENTS
• No boat license needed — Class A (30–50 HP) — license-free under Greek law
• 30-minute safety briefing on arrival
• Strictly no alcohol consumption before or during the trip
• Minimum age 18 to operate

INCLUDED
Fuel, GPS tracker, full insurance, safety briefing, hydraulic steering, swimming platform, sun canopy, cool box. Optional skipper available on request — quoted on WhatsApp.

boats.name: Maiora 26m
boats.tagline: 90ft luxury yacht · all-inclusive · refit 2023
boats.description:
This 90-foot Maiora yacht is perfect for unforgettable private day charters and overnight charters departing from prestigious Puerto Banús. All-inclusive: fuel at 10 knots for the full duration, captain & 2 crew, food & open bar, jetski & sea toys. 8-hour charters include giant slide & inflatable swimming pool. Heated fresh-water jacuzzi onboard. Fully refurbished in 2023.

ONBOARD EXPERIENCE
A unique and sophisticated space, ideal for relaxing and enjoying the sea. Sail in luxurious exclusivity with a crew dedicated to fulfilling all your nautical desires.

SPACES & AMENITIES
• Sundeck on the bow — perfect for sunbathing in total comfort
• Shaded area under the awning — relax in the shade with the sea breeze
• Spacious interior lounges — meetings, dining, rest
• Private cabins — restful nap or overnight stays
• 2 full bathrooms — comfort and privacy
• Living-dining room — elegant dinners or business meetings
• Large aft cockpit — ideal for social gatherings
• Majestic flybridge — 360° panoramic sea views
• Onboard jacuzzi — relax with the best views

ACTIVITIES ONBOARD
• Swim breaks in idyllic coves with crystal-clear water
• Snorkel goggles to explore the underwater world
• Fishing equipment
• Paddleboards
• Jetski for an adrenaline rush
• 8h charters: giant slide + inflatable swimming pool

PERFECT FOR
Special occasions, corporate events, family days, friends getaways, business dinners, poker nights, sundowner cocktails, or simply an exclusive day at sea on the Costa del Sol.

Affordable luxury — sailing in style and comfort on the impressive 26-metre Maiora yacht.

boats.name: Mangusta 80
boats.tagline: "Nina" — the biggest yacht you can rent in Marbella · 24 m Italian flagship with on-board jet ski · in service since 2020
boats.description: The Mangusta 80 — known on the dock as "Nina" — is the Marbella flagship: a 24-metre Italian sport yacht by Overmarine, in our charter fleet since 2020, and the largest boat available for day charter from Puerto Banús. Twelve guests in genuine luxury, a Sea-Doo jet ski waiting on the swim platform, and the unmistakable Mangusta open-style superstructure that put the brand on the global map. From €4,719 for a 4-hour charter, fully crewed.
features: Drinks (water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava)
Biggest yacht available for day charter in Marbella — 24 m / 80 ft
Sea-Doo jet ski on board — free for guests to use throughout the charter
Open-style sport yacht with full-beam sun-pad and aft swim platform
12 guests in luxury — chef-grade galley and air-conditioned saloon
Crewed by captain + deckhand; drinks, fuel, insurance and VAT included
In our charter fleet since 2020 — fully refit, immaculate condition
Minimum charter 4 hours; full-day and overnight options quoted on WhatsApp
